overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city street. The player moves past industrial structures and commercial buildings with large digital billboards, notably passing the 'softsys' building and interacting with a distinctive character with green hair. The environment transitions from open sidewalks to covered pedestrian walkways lined with cherry blossom trees.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a busy street with futuristic vehicles passing by on the right

horizontal pipe structure spanning across the street overhead
large commercial building with illuminated 'softsys' signage
black and yellow striped posts separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a futuristic city sidewalk. Industrial green pipes dominate the left side of the frame while vehicles pass by on the multi-lane street to the right. The camera moves steadily forward toward a large commercial building with 'softsys' signage visible in the distance, with black and yellow bollards lining the edge of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection in front of softsys building with crosswalk

events.description: camera turns right to focus on a pedestrian with green hair standing near a green railing
crossing the painted crosswalk at the intersection while vehicles wait

agents.ego_description: walking past the softsys building and turning to observe a character with distinctive green dreadlocks and red sunglasses standing by the railing

notable_agents.action: character with green hair and red sunglasses standing by the railing, looking toward the street

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen displaying animated content on the building facade
tall pole with traffic signs and digital displays showing '40' speed limit
rack with magazines and newspapers near the crosswalk entrance

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the prominent 'softsys' commercial building with large digital billboards. At approximately 20 seconds, the camera turns to focus on a distinctive NPC with green hair and red sunglasses standing by a railing. The player then continues across the painted crosswalk at the intersection, passing newspaper stands and street signage while futuristic vehicles wait at the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with cherry blossoms

events.description: entering the covered walkway beneath the elevated highway structure with reduced natural light

agents.ego_description: continuing through the urban environment under overhead highway structures with commercial signage visible

entered.detail: large concrete highway structure running overhead providing partial cover
tall skyscraper with distinctive red and white vertical stripes visible in the distance
pink flowering trees lining the edge of the covered walkway
bright blue automated vending machine with yellow signage

segments.scene_description: The player enters a semi-covered pedestrian walkway beneath an elevated highway structure. The lighting shifts to a mix of natural and artificial sources. Cherry blossom trees become visible along the left side, and a distinctive blue vending machine stands near the walkway edge. The softsys building fades from view as the player moves deeper under the overhead structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian promenade with cherry blossom trees and digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered pedestrian path lined with cherry blossom trees and various digital advertisement panels

entered.detail: multiple illuminated screens displaying various advertisements along the walkway wall
solid overhead structure providing full shelter from weather

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the covered pedestrian promenade with dense cherry blossom trees now prominent on the left. The player passes by digital advertisement panels and vending machines while walking under the solid overhead structure. The environment maintains a sheltered, urban atmosphere with mixed lighting and moderate vegetation density.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic city, transitioning from an open industrial sidewalk into a sheltered, blossom-lined pedestrian promenade. It begins by moving past industrial green pipes and black and yellow bollards along a busy multi-lane street, heading steadily toward a large commercial building marked with softsys signage. As the camera approaches the building and its digital billboards, it briefly turns to focus on a character with green hair and red sunglasses before crossing a painted intersection filled with futuristic vehicles and street signage. The scene then shifts as the player enters a semi-covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, where the lighting blends natural and artificial sources and the softsys building fades from view. Finally, the camera moves deeper under the overhead structure, passing blue vending machines and digital advertisement panels while dense cherry blossom trees line the left side of the sheltered urban path.
